Remarks/Remarques: Best mean curve statistics using all measurements for period of record, maintaining low & high-end precision to reduce estimates

Curve #11.00, though being much less of a statistical mean, has a more realistic exponent of 2.69. It uses the record high QM conducted 2017-10-19 as well as the second-lowest QM on record conducted 2016-01-06, and focuses on creating a realistic exponent. Although no other QMs for the review period plot on this curve, the absolute shifts employed to account for the changes in the stage/discharge relationship exhibited by these QMs are of a much more reasonable magnitude. Thus, less extreme and exaggerated departures from the curve occur, and discharge peaks are more realistic and comparable.
